name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international operator of pawn stores with 3,300+ locations across North America and Latin America, offering pawn loans secured by personal property.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the largest international pawn shop chain. Founded and grown into a major financial services provider, FirstCash has built a network spanning 29 U.S. states, Washington D.C., the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is listed on both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating significant scale and institutional credibility.

FirstCash's primary service is providing non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property. Customers can bring valuable items—jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments—and receive immediate cash loans. Beyond lending, FirstCash operates a retail merchandise business, buying and selling used goods across their store network. The company also offers layaway services (10% down payment option), gold/precious metals buying, and through its subsidiary AFF, provides lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations nationally.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive geographic footprint and institutional scale. With over 3,300 pawn locations, they offer unmatched convenience and network density compared to independent pawn shops. The company's public market status and inclusion in major indices reflects operational sophistication and regulatory compliance standards higher than typical small pawn operators. Their dual revenue model—lending and retail merchandise sales—creates operational flexibility and inventory diversity.

Honestly assessed, FirstCash is best suited for consumers who need immediate, short-term cash and have valuable items to pledge. The pawn loan model inherently carries risks: if you cannot repay, you lose your collateral permanently (non-recourse means the lender cannot pursue you legally, but you forfeit the item). Interest rates and fees on pawn loans, while competitive within the industry, are typically higher than traditional personal loans. This service is appropriate for true emergency situations but should not be a primary financial strategy due to the collateral loss risk and effective cost of borrowing.
pros: Over 3,300 locations across 29 U.S. states plus international presence, providing maximum convenience and accessibility
Immediate cash available on the spot with no credit check required—serving credit-constrained consumers
Non-recourse pawn loans mean borrowers cannot be sued or pursued for unpaid loans, limiting personal liability
Wide range of acceptable collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Layaway service available with just 10% down payment for customers who want to purchase without full upfront payment
Gold and precious metals buying service for quick cash conversion of jewelry and valuables
Publicly traded company (S&P 400, Russell 2000 indices) indicating strong compliance, transparency, and operational standards
cons: Non-recourse pawn loans mean permanent loss of collateral if loan is not repaid—no flexibility to recover items
Pawn loan interest rates and fees, while competitive within the industry, are substantially higher than traditional personal loans or credit
Items pawned are sold off if loan defaults, creating real financial and emotional loss for borrowers
Retail merchandise model means inventory is unpredictable and specific items cannot be guaranteed to be in stock
best_for: Consumers with credit constraints or no credit history who need emergency cash quickly
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they're willing to temporarily pledge for short-term cash
Borrowers seeking an alternative to payday loans with non-recourse lending (no debt collection risk)
Individuals looking to sell valuables (gold, jewelry, electronics) for immediate cash without brokerage fees
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for credit-constrained consumers in genuine financial emergencies who have valuable collateral they can pledge for immediate cash. The main caveat is that this is a collateral-based loan model where failure to repay results in permanent loss of the pledged item—this should be a last resort, not a primary borrowing strategy, and customers should be confident they can repay within the loan term to avoid losing irreplaceable valuables.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Retail buying and selling of merchandise across 3,300+ store locations
Gold, silver, and platinum buying service with cash payment on spot
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Store locator tool to find nearest location across U.S., Latin America, and UK
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through subsidiary AFF (15,000+ merchant partners)
Point-of-sale payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
Non-recourse lending with no credit check or approval process
